SafetyAgent.name: Safety Goal
SafetyAgent.description: Safety objective for ATM: A bank client can have two types of accounts

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 1
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): A bank client can have two types of accounts
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for hazard prevention

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 2
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): A checking-account and a saving-account
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for fault tolerance

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 3
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (risk mitigation): For each checking account, one related saving-account can exists
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for risk mitigation

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 4
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): The application must verify that a client can gain access to his or her account by identification via a personal identification number (PIN) code
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for hazard prevention

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 5
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): Neither a checking-account nor a saving-account can have a negative balance
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for fault tolerance

EfficiencyAgent.name: Efficiency Goal
EfficiencyAgent.description: Efficiency objective for ATM: For each checking account, one related saving-account can exists

EfficiencyAgent.name: Efficiency Requirement 1
EfficiencyAgent.description: The system shall ensure efficiency (latency optimization): For each checking account, one related saving-account can exists
EfficiencyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for latency optimization

EfficiencyAgent.name: Efficiency Requirement 2
EfficiencyAgent.description: The system shall ensure efficiency (throughput stability): The application must verify that a client can gain access to his or her account by identification via a personal identification number (PIN) code
EfficiencyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for throughput stability

EfficiencyAgent.name: Efficiency Requirement 3
EfficiencyAgent.description: The system shall ensure efficiency (resource utilization): Neither a checking-account nor a saving-account can have a negative balance
EfficiencyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for resource utilization

EfficiencyAgent.name: Efficiency Requirement 4
EfficiencyAgent.description: The system shall ensure efficiency (latency optimization): The application should automatically withdraw funds from a related saving-account if the requested withdrawal amount on the checking-account is more than its current balance
EfficiencyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for latency optimization

EfficiencyAgent.name: Efficiency Requirement 5
EfficiencyAgent.description: The system shall ensure efficiency (throughput stability): If the saving-account balance is insufficient to cover the requested withdrawal amount, the application should inform the user and terminate the transaction
EfficiencyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for throughput stability

GreenAgent.name: Sustainability Goal
GreenAgent.description: Sustainability objective for ATM: Neither a checking-account nor a saving-account can have a negative balance

GreenAgent.name: Sustainability Requirement 1
GreenAgent.description: The system shall ensure sustainability (energy footprint reduction): Neither a checking-account nor a saving-account can have a negative balance
GreenAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for energy footprint reduction

GreenAgent.name: Sustainability Requirement 2
GreenAgent.description: The system shall ensure sustainability (resource lifecycle control): The application should automatically withdraw funds from a related saving-account if the requested withdrawal amount on the checking-account is more than its current balance
GreenAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for resource lifecycle control

GreenAgent.name: Sustainability Requirement 3
GreenAgent.description: The system shall ensure sustainability (environmental impact awareness): If the saving-account balance is insufficient to cover the requested withdrawal amount, the application should inform the user and terminate the transaction
GreenAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for environmental impact awareness

GreenAgent.name: Sustainability Requirement 4
GreenAgent.description: The system shall ensure sustainability (energy footprint reduction): The bank client must be able to deposit an amount to and withdraw an amount from his or her accounts using the bank application
GreenAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for energy footprint reduction

GreenAgent.name: Sustainability Requirement 5
GreenAgent.description: The system shall ensure sustainability (resource lifecycle control): Each transaction must be recorded, and the client must have the ability to review all transactions performed against a given account
GreenAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for resource lifecycle control

GreenAgent.name: Sustainability Requirement 6
GreenAgent.description: The system shall ensure sustainability (environmental impact awareness): Recorded transactions must include the date, time, transaction type, amount and account balance after the transaction
GreenAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for environmental impact awareness

GreenAgent.name: Sustainability Requirement 7
GreenAgent.description: The system shall ensure sustainability (energy footprint reduction): A bank client can have two types of accounts
GreenAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for energy footprint reduction

TrustworthinessAgent.name: Trustworthiness Goal
TrustworthinessAgent.description: Trustworthiness objective for ATM: If the saving-account balance is insufficient to cover the requested withdrawal amount, the application should inform the user and terminate the transaction

TrustworthinessAgent.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 1
TrustworthinessAgent.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (security assurance): If the saving-account balance is insufficient to cover the requested withdrawal amount, the application should inform the user and terminate the transaction
TrustworthinessAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for security assurance

TrustworthinessAgent.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 2
TrustworthinessAgent.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (auditability): The bank client must be able to deposit an amount to and withdraw an amount from his or her accounts using the bank application

TrustworthinessAgent.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 3
TrustworthinessAgent.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (integrity guarantees): Each transaction must be recorded, and the client must have the ability to review all transactions performed against a given account
TrustworthinessAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for integrity guarantees

TrustworthinessAgent.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 4
TrustworthinessAgent.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (security assurance): Recorded transactions must include the date, time, transaction type, amount and account balance after the transaction
TrustworthinessAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for security assurance

TrustworthinessAgent.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 5
TrustworthinessAgent.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (auditability): A bank client can have two types of accounts

TrustworthinessAgent.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 6
TrustworthinessAgent.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (integrity guarantees): A checking-account and a saving-account
TrustworthinessAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for integrity guarantees

TrustworthinessAgent.name: Trustworthiness Requirement 7
TrustworthinessAgent.description: The system shall ensure trustworthiness (security assurance): For each checking account, one related saving-account can exists
TrustworthinessAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for security assurance

ResponsibilityAgent.name: Responsibility Goal
ResponsibilityAgent.description: Responsibility objective for ATM: Each transaction must be recorded, and the client must have the ability to review all transactions performed against a given account

ResponsibilityAgent.name: Responsibility Requirement 1
ResponsibilityAgent.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (regulatory accountability): Each transaction must be recorded, and the client must have the ability to review all transactions performed against a given account
ResponsibilityAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for regulatory accountability

ResponsibilityAgent.name: Responsibility Requirement 2
ResponsibilityAgent.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (stakeholder transparency): Recorded transactions must include the date, time, transaction type, amount and account balance after the transaction
ResponsibilityAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for stakeholder transparency

ResponsibilityAgent.name: Responsibility Requirement 3
ResponsibilityAgent.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (ethical compliance): A bank client can have two types of accounts
ResponsibilityAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for ethical compliance

ResponsibilityAgent.name: Responsibility Requirement 4
ResponsibilityAgent.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (regulatory accountability): A checking-account and a saving-account
ResponsibilityAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for regulatory accountability

ResponsibilityAgent.name: Responsibility Requirement 5
ResponsibilityAgent.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (stakeholder transparency): For each checking account, one related saving-account can exists
ResponsibilityAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for stakeholder transparency

ResponsibilityAgent.name: Responsibility Requirement 6
ResponsibilityAgent.description: The system shall ensure responsibility (ethical compliance): The application must verify that a client can gain access to his or her account by identification via a personal identification number (PIN) code
ResponsibilityAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for ethical compliance
